security.title: 72-Hour Guarantee
security.desc: All orders are covered by a 72-hour after-delivery guarantee. Contact us anytime if issues arise.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.desc: Once payment is confirmed, coins will be delivered to your account within the estimated time shown.

payment.title: Secure Payment
payment.desc: Powered by Stripe with full encryption. We accept major credit cards for a safe checkout experience.

privacy.title: Privacy Protection
privacy.desc: Your personal information and transaction data are strictly protected and never shared with third parties.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Payments are currently disabled in the MVP. A bank payment gateway will be integrated after the website is finalized and approved.
checkout.noOrder: No checkout item. Please select a package from

cart.title: Cart
cart.subtitle: Review selected packages and submit orders one by one with the current business flow.
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Pick an FC26 package to get started.
cart.summaryHint: The cart only stores selections temporarily. Final order price, coins, and platform availability are revalidated at checkout.
cart.mergeReadyNote: Reserved for future merged checkout while keeping this card compact.

about.title: About Valbri
about.description1: Valbri is an online gaming marketplace focused on FC26 Ultimate Team coins and selected game services. Our goal is to provide fast, reliable, and user-friendly delivery with a transparent ordering process.
about.description2: This website is currently operating in MVP mode. Payments are disabled, and a bank payment gateway will be integrated after the website is finalized and approved.
about.notice: Company details and legal information will be added during the final launch phase.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For business inquiries, support, or partnership requests, please contact us using the information below.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Valbri. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.

serviceScope.title: Service Scope
serviceScope.content: Valbri operates as a gaming marketplace focused on FC26 Ultimate Team coins and selected game-related services. This website is currently operating in MVP mode.

payments.title: Payments
payments.content: Payments are currently disabled. A bank payment gateway will be integrated after the website is finalized and approved.

userResponsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.content: Users are responsible for providing accurate information when submitting orders and must not share unnecessary or sensitive account details.

changes.title: Changes
changes.content: Valbri reserves the right to update or modify these terms at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Valbri respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.content: During the MVP phase, we may collect basic contact information such as name and email address when users submit an order or inquiry.

use.title: Use of Information
use.content: Collected information is used solely for communication, order processing, and service improvement purposes.

security.title: Payments & Security
security.content: No payment information is collected at this stage. Secure bank payment processing will be introduced after approval.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: Valbri does not sell or share personal data with third parties.

auth.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
auth.sessionExpiredDesc: Your session has timed out. Please sign in again to continue.

cs.title: Valbri Support
cs.empty: Start the conversation here. Guest users can also chat with support.
cs.sessionAccessDenied: This support session expired. Please close it and open support again.
cs.sessionClosed: This support session has been closed.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.subtitle: View your purchase history and order status.

payment.successDesc: Your payment has been processed. We will deliver your coins shortly.
payment.confirmingDesc: We received the return from Stripe and are waiting for the webhook to finalize the result. This usually takes 1 to 2 seconds.
payment.pendingDesc: Your payment was submitted, but the final confirmation has not arrived yet. Please check your orders page shortly.
payment.confirmFailedDesc: We could not fetch the latest payment result right now. Please check your orders page shortly.
payment.cancelDesc: Your payment was not completed. You can try again from your orders page.
payment.notConfigured: Payment service is being configured. Please try again later.
